## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Python version:** (e.g., 3.11.8)
- **Node version:** (e.g., 18.19)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 122, if UI-related)
- **Promptdis version/commit:** (e.g., v0.1.0 or commit SHA)

## Additional context

Any other relevant information.
